authorMeta.name: amandatquan
text:
luxury items doesn’t always have to come straight from the boutiques as there are so many factors when buying luxury. after figuring out what you prioritize most— whether that be price, model, leather, hardware, etc., you can determine if purchasing from the chanel boutiques or second hand is best for you! 

PLEASE do your due diligence when purchasing 2nd hand luxury on facebook groups to avoid getting scammed! i used the CHANEL BUY/SELL/TRADE facebook group since it had the most members, but that still doesn’t mean every seller is legit!

don’t be shy to ask for seller references, do your research, & NEGOTIATE price if possible! :) 

#chanel #chanelbag #luxury #luxurybag #chanelminiflapbag #chanelmini #chanelminiflap #facebookgroups #facebook #secondhandluxury

authorMeta.name: amandatquan
text:
luxury items doesn’t always have to come straight from the boutiques as there are so many factors when buying luxury. after figuring out what you prioritize most— whether that be price, model, leather, hardware, etc., you can determine if purchasing from the chanel boutiques or second hand is best for you! 

PLEASE do your due diligence when purchasing 2nd hand luxury on facebook groups to avoid getting scammed! i used the CHANEL BUY/SELL/TRADE facebook group since it had the most members, but that still doesn’t mean every seller is legit!

don’t be shy to ask for seller references, do your research, & NEGOTIATE price if possible! :)

authorMeta.name: caviarandchevre
text:
Imagine someone telling you, “It’s just a handbag,” and you’re holding the one that costs more than a Bugatti. 👜✨
This is the Hermès Himalaya Birkin 30 – one of the rarest, most insane bags on the planet.
From the “snow-capped” dye process to a single master artisan spending 40+ hours on your bag (and being the only one allowed to touch it at Hermès Spa)… this isn’t an accessory, it’s wearable art that can outlive you.
Now when you see a Himalaya Birkin, you’ll know why it’s in a different universe.
If you love luxury bag stories and want to understand what you’re really buying, follow for more. 🤍
#hermes #birkin #himalayabirkin #luxurybags #designerhandbags #luxuryfashion #baglover #bagtok

authorMeta.name: bydaninoir
text:
Here is a storytime on how I was able to get offered my Birkin in paris without any purchase history.

The flagship story in Paris doesn't require you to have a purchase history to get offered a quota bag, however you do have to get a leather appointment which can be harder.

They don’t require you to have a purchase history so you don’t have to deal with the 1:1 or 2:1 ratio, however it is harder to build relationships with SA’s because they do not give a phone number or any contact information sometimes they might give you an email. 

If you don’t want to play the Hermes game or don’t care about building an relationship with an SA, then the flagship store in Paris is perfect for you to get your first quota bag 

#hermes #hermesgame 
#hermesappointment #birkin #quotabag

Minimal, functional, and unmistakably Bottega—an elevated essential that never needs logos to stand out.

authorMeta.name: bydaninoir
text:
Here is a storytime on how I was able to get offered my Birkin in paris without any purchase history.

The flagship story in Paris doesn't require you to have a purchase history to get offered a quota bag, however you do have to get a leather appointment which can be harder.

They don’t require you to have a purchase history so you don’t have to deal with the 1:1 or 2:1 ratio, however it is harder to build relationships with SA’s because they do not give a phone number or any contact information sometimes they might give you an email. 

If you don’t want to play the Hermes game or don’t care about building an relationship with an SA, then the flagship store in Paris is perfect for you to get your first quota bag 

#hermes #hermesgame 
#hermesappointment #birkin #quotabag

Now the dangerous part? I have budget leftover for another wishlist item 😅✨
Store: Kaitadorah (right off the corner of Gallery Rare)

authorMeta.name: caviarandchevre
text:
Imagine someone telling you, “It’s just a handbag,” and you’re holding the one that costs more than a Bugatti. 👜✨
This is the Hermès Himalaya Birkin 30 – one of the rarest, most insane bags on the planet.
From the “snow-capped” dye process to a single master artisan spending 40+ hours on your bag (and being the only one allowed to touch it at Hermès Spa)… this isn’t an accessory, it’s wearable art that can outlive you.
Now when you see a Himalaya Birkin, you’ll know why it’s in a different universe.
If you love luxury bag stories and want to understand what you’re really buying, follow for more. 🤍
#hermes #birkin #himalayabirkin #luxurybags #designerhandbags #luxuryfashion #baglover #bagtok

text:
Should you buy the Dior Saddle Bag? 👀 This is my 1 MONTH REVIEW of the Dior Saddle Blue Oblique Jacquard bag that I rented from @Vivrelle which is a luxury handbag + fine jewelry rental platform (Use Code: NAHEEMAH for your first month FREE + redeem $300 in luxury credit using the 🔗 in my bio) ✨ My Thoughts: 
- it fits more than I expected 
- the bag is high quality and seems to hold up well over time 
- Not plus size friendly as a shoulder bag though brand new, it does come with a crossbody strap 
- Comes is a gorgeous array of materials and colors
But ultimately I think I would be most happy with buying a vintage bag preferably in a solid leather 💖

What are your thoughts? @Dior

authorMeta.name: naheemahazordesigns
text:
Should you buy the Dior Saddle Bag? 👀 This is my 1 MONTH REVIEW of the Dior Saddle Blue Oblique Jacquard bag that I rented from @Vivrelle which is a luxury handbag + fine jewelry rental platform (Use Code: NAHEEMAH for your first month FREE + redeem $300 in luxury credit using the 🔗 in my bio) ✨ My Thoughts: 
- it fits more than I expected 
- the bag is high quality and seems to hold up well over time 
- Not plus size friendly as a shoulder bag though brand new, it does come with a crossbody strap 
- Comes is a gorgeous array of materials and colors
But ultimately I think I would be most happy with buying a vintage bag preferably in a solid leather 💖

What are your thoughts? @Dior

authorMeta.name: moodimun
text:
After 3 year of owning this Dior mini saddle bag, here is my review/opinion on it. I think this is enough time to really know whats what, dont you think? In my opinion, i find that this is one of my favorite bags because its special and different ✨️ For some reason i reach out to it often even if it doesnt hold a lot (i try to make it work as much as possible 😅). If there's one piece of advice that i will say about the saddle bag (especially if you are on a budget) is to not buy this brand new because the turnover price for dior is still low compared to chanel and hermes.

authorMeta.name: luxereissued
text:
Chanel Classic Flap Maxi – 2008/2009 Special Edition – Fuchsia Caviar SHW

An iconic and highly collectible Chanel Classic Flap in the discontinued single flap style. Lightweight and more spacious than the double flap, with one generous main compartment plus two additional pockets (one zipped, one open).

Crafted in rare Fuchsia Pink soft “washed” caviar leather with silver hardware. This special edition item has a larger CC turn-lock and back plate, and is designed to have a beautiful, relaxed slouch rather than a rigid structure with a smooth lambskin lining.

Maxi size is the largest Classic Flap size made and comfortably fits your tablet and daily essentials, perfect for work or everyday wear.

Condition notes: Unused condition. No creasing, no corner wear, no scuffs. Hardware is bright and shiny. Interior is clean.

AUD $5800

Including shipping original dust bag, box, care booklet, authenticity card.

Measurements: 33cm W x 23cm H x 10cm D
Strap drop: 30.5cm

A rare opportunity to own a discontinued single flap in a limited-edition colourway.

Item has been acquired by a trusted seller. For additional assurance of authenticity, the option to purchase a digital authenticity report/certificate via LegitApp is available at checkout

Disclaimer: This item is pre-owned. We are not affiliated with or endorsed by any brand mentioned
